items.title: Grammar focus
items.body:
Use the structure from the workbook. Pay attention to word order, negatives, and questions.

Examples:
• Do you prefer to speak English or Spanish?
• 6- Do you eat popcorn at the movies? / candy / chocolate
• 4- I have money

items.prompt: , but I don’t want to go to the movies.

items.text: Do you help your wife at home?
Do you prefer to speak English or Spanish?
6- Do you eat popcorn at the movies? / candy / chocolate
